scripts.build: pnpm --filter trellis-hgl-core build && pnpm --filter trellis-hgl build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter trellis-hgl-core test && pnpm run test:cli
scripts.test:cli: pnpm --filter trellis-hgl-core build && pnpm --filter trellis-hgl test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter trellis-hgl-core lint && pnpm --filter trellis-hgl lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter trellis-hgl-core build && pnpm --filter trellis-hgl typecheck
